description: P0-D20 closure readiness dry-run for GC-Knowledge Fabric D9-D19 candidate evidence.
readyEvidence: D9-D18 validators are indexed by the D19 candidate ledger.
D19 validates validator and LOOP evidence references.
No-write API skeleton, handler mapping, route adapter, and acceptance packet dry-run chain are covered.
Document pollution, KDS token, and loop document gates remain runnable as end-of-turn checks.
remainingHumanActions: Human review must decide whether candidate evidence is sufficient for P0 acceptance.
Harness Governance must write or reject formal evidence records.
No lifecycle may be promoted to accepted or integrated by this dry-run.
Production server, database, KDS API, GFIS/GPC writeback, and business-system integration remain out of scope.

closureRisks.note: Dry-run evidence exists, but formal Harness evidence store has not been written.
Candidate readiness still requires human review.
No HTTP server, DB, external API, KDS write, or GFIS/GPC writeback has been enabled.
